title: Kratzmannia cristata
taxonomy: Kratzmannia cristata is classified as a species of plant in the family Asparagaceae, order Asparagales, and class Liliopsida. It belongs to the genus Kratzmannia, which is a group of plants that are closely related to the genus Asparagus. The classification of Kratzmannia cristata reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants.
